h2.visual_description: Large, sans-serif font in a reddish-brown color, left-aligned, no numbering.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption label, bolded and followed by a period.
Hyperlink to an external resource or internal document reference.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Parenthetical author-date (e.g., Hare, Kirschner, and Reed 2020)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer contains a page number followed by a vertical pipe and the section title in reddish-brown, uppercase sans-serif text (e.g., '90 | PROGRAM MANAGEMENT').
